title: tiniaria × heterocarpa
intro: Tiniaria × heterocarpa, also known as American Waterplantain, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of American Waterplantain include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tiniaria × heterocarpa typically involve drying and infusing the roots or rhizomes, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or salves for medicinal purposes.
